ddls:
CREATE TABLE "executions" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each execution record */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the individual executed */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race of the individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual at the time of execution */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of crime committed */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the method of execution */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the execution */,
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the month of the execution */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the execution */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the execution took place */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the individual */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place of birth of the individual */,
  "execution_location_details" TEXT /* Detailed location of the execution */,
  "execution_judges" TEXT /* Names of the judges who presided over the execution */,
  "witnesses" TEXT /* Names of the witnesses present at the execution */,
  "execution_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or details about the execution */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the execution record has been verified */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* The last time the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_executions_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_executions_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_executions_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_executions_month_id FOREIGN KEY ("month_id") REFERENCES months ("month_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_executions_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crimes" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime */,
  "crime_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the crime */,
  "legal_references" TEXT /* Legal references or statutes related to the crime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "legal_basis" TEXT /* The legal basis or law that authorized the method of execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "population_at_execution_time" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the state at the time of the execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the source document or website */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* A score indicating the reliability of the source */,
  "curator_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments from the curator about the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the execution record being annotated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the annotation */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note or annotation text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was created */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the annotation has been resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes or details about the resolution of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_execution_id FOREIGN KEY ("execution_id") REFERENCES executions ("execution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin, data entry) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or affiliation of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last time the user logged in */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "execution_sources" (
  "execution_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source entry */,
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the execution record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the source has been verified */,
  "source_confidence_level" TEXT /* The confidence level in the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_execution_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_execution_sources_execution_id FOREIGN KEY ("execution_id") REFERENCES executions ("execution_id")
)
